evidence: Box A realized gain/loss equals proceeds minus cost basis, with wash-sale disallowed shown separately.
Broker says: The disallowed loss is included in the cost basis; therefore, it is calculated into the realized gain/loss.
rule: Form 8949 gain/loss = brokerReportedGainLoss (do not add wash-sale).

evidence: Proceeds − cost basis + wash sale equals the displayed net gain/loss.
